subject: [SO] First release images for the J release
commit_message:
[SO] First release images for the J release

First images of SO for Jakarta release.

Issue-ID: SO-3912

Signed-off-by: Seshu-Kumar-M <seshu.kumar.m@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I666a5a7e3be27cf24c2c557c9ce2f696213d1aff

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4887/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.
